# product-config

Application product settings: tracking, node labels, sync impersonation, in-cluster

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/application/product-config` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  application.instanceLabelKey: mycompany.com/appname
  application.resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
  application.allowedNodeLabels: topology.kubernetes.io/zone,node.kubernetes.io/instance-type
  application.sync.impersonation.enabled: "true"
  application.sync.impersonation.enforced: "true"
  application.sync.requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: "true"
  cluster.inClusterEnabled: "true"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  cluster:
    inClusterEnabled: true
  controller:
    allowedNodeLabelKeys:
    - topology.kubernetes.io/zone
    - node.kubernetes.io/instance-type
    instanceLabelKey: mycompany.com/appname
    resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
    sync:
      impersonation:
        mode: required
      requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: true
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  application.allowedNodeLabels: topology.kubernetes.io/zone,node.kubernetes.io/instance-type
  application.instanceLabelKey: mycompany.com/appname
  application.resourceTrackingMethod: annotation
  application.sync.impersonation.enabled: "true"
  application.sync.impersonation.enforced: "true"
  application.sync.requireOverridePrivilegeForRevisionSync: "true"
  cluster.inClusterEnabled: "true"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `diagnostics.yaml`

  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
